rationale: Review 2's finding is valid (mapsTo_fiber_symm's proof reduces to mapsTo_fiber φ⁻¹ b via Subgroup.coe_inv), but this is a proof-simplification observation rather than a generality defect — the lemma statement itself is at the right level. Under the generality rubric, both reviews reach the same conclusion about definition and lemma scope, and acting on either leaves the PR at the same level of generality.
